title: Mine Cells - 3D Weapons Pack
description: Alternative 3D Weapon Models for Mine Cells
body:
# Mine Cells - Alternative Weapon Models

<center>

[![Donate on ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Donate_on_ko--fi-red?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/mim1q)
[![Join my Community](https://img.shields.io/badge/Join_my_Community-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/6TjQbSjbuB)

</center>

This resource pack adds alternative custom, three-dimensional weapon models for Mine Cells!

![Mine Cells](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Dp3twuO6/images/11db47612a73d7162bb9546c8a303b9684626ce5.png)

All Rights Reserved © 2024 Mim1q

## Permissions

You are **not allowed** to:

-   Reupload this resource pack to any other website or platform.
-   Claim any part of this resource pack as your own.
-   Try to make money off of this resource pack.

You are **allowed** to:

-   Use this resource pack in your videos, streams, blogs etc.
-   Package this resource pack with your modpacks, as long as they are published either on CurseForge or Modrinth.

If you're unsure about something, feel free to ask me on Discord, linked at the top of this page.

[![Bisect hosting - use code LUNAPIXEL](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mim1q/MineCells/1.20.x/projectPageAssets/hosting-code.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/p/lunapixel)
